title: Corruption's Game
description: A once peaceful retreat turned into a twisted game of survival.
body:
_These worlds were supposed to be your escape from the stresses of life. Now, the fight to protect them is the most stressful thing you deal with._

Corruption's Game is a survival-oriented modpack focused on fighting for your world's survival. Whether in traditional survival or hardcore, survive as long as possible against powerful creatures of the night, all with one purpose: Take your life as soon as possible. Train your skills quickly to equip stronger weapons and tools, because after 10 nights you can expect to fight your first horde night, when the monsters of the night rise to threaten your life in hundreds. Fend them off to buy yourself more time. Repurpose their equipment as your own, and take out as many as you can night after night.

Take on multiple bosses to try and free your world from the invading dangers. From ghostly villagers to powerful knights, several mods-worth of bosses await you. Hunt them down and take them on for even more powerful loot.

Use branching lines of progression to aid in your survival. Build a base, or travel the world as a nomad. Construct a thriving colony or enslave the villager population to provide what you need. Utilize traditional weaponry, or harness the power of otherworldly magic. Breed and train dogs, or conquer and tame dragons. The choice is yours, and with an upcoming quest system to path out every option, you'll know exactly how to continue forward.

This modpack features certain mods made by people who want their links down here! Their mods, and any mod creators that ask to be included will be listed below, a special thanks to all of them, and the other mod creators in this mod!

Easy Villagers by henkelmax
[https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-villagers)

Corpse by henkelmax
[https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)

Born in Chaos by mongoose_artist
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
